testcase.name: audit schema DDL > creates audit.events table with metadata and pk columns
audit schema DDL > exposes audit.write helper
audit schema DDL > extracts primary key data for trigger events
audit schema DDL > exposes audit.verify_chain helper
auth schema DDL > defines auth schema
auth schema DDL > exposes tenancy membership with RLS policies
auth schema DDL > sets up Cognito mirror tables
auth schema DDL > defines reusable tenant/RLS helper functions
storage schema DDL > defines storage schema and files table
storage schema DDL > enables row level security
db invariant: audit attach completeness > proves audit.attach_dml_triggers attaches audit_log_dml to an explicit scratch table
db invariant: audit attach completeness > keeps current DDL explicit: no built-in app table has audit_log_dml pre-attached
db DDL object coverage ledger > accounts for every first-class table and function in canonical DDL schemas
db DDL object coverage ledger > accounts for every DDL trigger, RLS policy, index, and foreign-key edge
db DDL object coverage ledger > requires RLS enablement, force-RLS, and seed-critical rows for every tenant-scoped DDL table
db invariant: extension list > loads exactly the current DDL-declared extensions beyond plpgsql
db invariant: RLS policy completeness > keeps the current DDL tenant-scoped table set deterministic
db invariant: RLS policy completeness > enables and forces RLS on the current DDL tenant-scoped tables
db invariant: RLS policy completeness > keeps the expected policy names attached to the expected targets
db invariant: soft-delete archive mirrors > reports the current DDL soft-delete columns without expanding the policy contract
db invariant: soft-delete archive mirrors > keeps current DDL explicit: storage.files has no declared archive mirror table
db seed base shape > loads the canonical row counts from db/seed/00-base.sql
db seed base shape > pins the default tenancy and admin user identity
db seed base shape > pins role and group mappings used by the base admin identity
db runtime extensions > applies DDL and seed files in lexical order
db runtime extensions > loads the extensions declared by db/ddl/00-extensions.sql
db runtime extensions > exposes functions backed by the declared extensions
audit hash-chain runtime behavior > formats timestamps, computes hashes, and sets pinned row hashes on insert
audit hash-chain runtime behavior > audit.write appends tenant-local hashes and uses auth.current_tenant when tenant is omitted
audit hash-chain runtime behavior > verify_chain accepts the pinned chain and reports payload tampering
audit DML trigger runtime behavior > extract_primary_key returns ordered primary-key JSON and null for unsupported rows
audit DML trigger runtime behavior > fn_log_dml records INSERT, UPDATE, and DELETE through audit.attach_dml_triggers
audit DML trigger runtime behavior > audit.attach_dml_triggers replaces an existing audit trigger without duplicating events
audit.events tenant_scope RLS runtime behavior > limits non-owner reads to auth.current_tenant plus tenantless audit events
audit.events tenant_scope RLS runtime behavior > allows platform:superadmin context to read all tenant-scoped audit events
audit.events tenant_scope RLS runtime behavior > rejects inserts for another tenant under the non-owner application role
auth runtime RLS policies > filters auth.tenancies through the tenant_isolation policy
auth runtime RLS policies > rejects cross-tenant tenancy inserts through tenant_isolation WITH CHECK
auth runtime RLS policies > filters auth.tenancy_members through tenant_isolation and membership_isolation
auth runtime RLS policies > filters auth.users through users_isolation and hides cross-tenant updates
auth runtime RLS policies > filters auth.user_roles through user_roles_isolation
auth runtime RLS policies > filters auth.user_groups through user_groups_isolation
auth runtime RLS policies > honors auth.set_user_context roles when platform:superadmin is present
auth tenant context runtime helpers > sets and clears user, role, language, and tenant context on the current connection
auth tenant context runtime helpers > rejects a non-UUID user context value with SQLSTATE 22023
auth tenant context runtime helpers > keeps tenant context isolated per database connection
auth tenant context runtime helpers > enforces tenancy_id with auth.create_tenant_enforcement_trigger and auth.apply_tenant
auth tenant context runtime helpers > enforces tenant_id through auth.attach_tenant_enforcement_triggers and auth.apply_tenant_id
auth tenant context runtime helpers > permits cross-tenant insert only when the session role context includes platform:superadmin
auth touch triggers > updates auth.tenancies.updated_at on UPDATE and leaves it stable on INSERT
auth touch triggers > updates auth.users.updated_at on UPDATE and leaves it stable on INSERT
auth touch triggers > updates auth.roles.updated_at on UPDATE and leaves it stable on INSERT
auth touch triggers > updates auth.tenancy_members.updated_at on UPDATE and leaves it stable on INSERT
storage.files runtime behavior > inserts a storage file with generated identity, defaults, and current-tenant enforcement
storage.files runtime behavior > fires storage.touch_updated_at on update and leaves explicit insert timestamps untouched
storage.files runtime behavior > rejects storage file inserts when the provided tenant mismatches auth.current_tenant
storage.files runtime behavior > applies tenant_scope RLS so a non-owner role sees only the current tenant files
